title: Smeltable ore Blocks [+Tools]
description: This mod makes life in the furnace easier, allowing you to smelt raw block ores, but also the improves the armor and tools smelting results
body:
**This mod makes life in the furnace easier, allowing you to smelt raw block ores, armor and tools for its smelted alternatives.**

Ever since mojang 💀 added the blocks of raw ores, they had no purpose other than decoration, so I decided to create a mod that adds this feature so that raw ore blocks are no longer completely useless.

In case you have no idea what ur doing; to craft a Raw ore block you have to put in the crafting grid 3x3 either **gold**, **iron** or **copper**.
Then put the block you just made inside of a furnace or a blast furnace, the process will take about 7 seconds and you'll recieve the smelt block alternative, with 9 times the experience as smelting the regular ingot.

![Raw iron block >> Iron block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7a29df15bd33180fc45ac6bfc8ce2b3626c6fb0.png)

The mod also improves/buffs the smelting result of a particular piece of armor or tool.

The previous "nuggets" you were getting from smelting golden or iron tools in the furnace, i changed to ingots, so its not absolutely useless.
Not only that, i've added other types of armor and tools on the table, which are either leather, chainmail, diamond, and the netherite, so from smelting **leather stuff, you will get one leather, chainmail, you will get one chain, diamond armor or tool, you will get one diamond, and lastly netherite, you will get one netherite ingot,** which is helpful in case you want to retrieve a netherite bar from a tool you no longer use.
Netherite will burn the longest, about 16 seconds, so you can realllllly think if this is a good idea.

![Leather armor >> one leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccfa82573defb9e1742a800b7010c7e0f6a8c70c.png)
![Iron armor piece or tool >> iron ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87c0cd5bedaa001c9952f44ae6ae319373f71d8b.png)
